title: CARS — Coherent Anti-Stokes Raman Scattering
source_data_quality_note: Source MD is widefield-fluorescence boilerplate. Physics grounded in Zumbusch-Holtom-Xie 1999 CARS microscopy; Evans-Xie 2008 Annu. Rev. Anal. Chem.; Cheng-Xie 2015 comparison with SRS; Krafft et al. 2011 multiplex CARS.

E.description: Two synchronized picosecond pulses (pump omega_p, Stokes omega_s) beat at the vibrational frequency Omega = omega_p - omega_s, driving coherent molecular vibrations; a third photon (often same as pump) probes the coherence, yielding an anti-Stokes signal at omega_AS = 2*omega_p - omega_s. Signal is chi^(3)-driven, scales as I_p^2 * I_s.
E.forward_model: I_CARS(r, Omega) ~ |chi_R^(3)(Omega) * N(r) + chi_NR^(3)|^2 * I_p^2(r) * I_s(r)
E.world_state_x: Chemical concentration maps N(r) and non-resonant background chi_NR
E.observation_y: Anti-Stokes intensity at each spatial point and frequency shift Omega
physical_parameters_theta: Pump wavelength lambda_p, Stokes wavelength lambda_s
Non-resonant background strength rho_NR = chi_NR / chi_R

W.uniqueness: for known chi_NR; blind case ill-posed due to |.|^2 phase ambiguity
W.regime: Well-posed for multiplex CARS with full spectrum + max-entropy phase retrieval; ill-posed for narrowband CARS contaminated by chi_NR (distortive interference with Lorentzian chi_R).

C.solver_class: CLS (single-frequency), KK (Kramers-Kronig) phase retrieval, max-entropy (Vartiainen 1992), learned CARS-Net, MCR-ALS
C.error_bound: Concentration error saturates by chi_NR interference; KK-phase retrieval bounded by BW / Omega_range
C.complexity: KK O(H*W*N_omega * log(N_omega)); max-entropy O(H*W*iter*N_omega); learned single forward
